title: Latest-complete freshness registry
goal: Create a latest-complete RepoBrief bundle registry and freshness check path that records source commit, generated bundle stem, manifest hash, health state and stale/unknown status without causing hidden refresh during reads.

acceptance.assertion: A machine-readable latest-complete registry records bundle stem, manifest hash, source commit, generation time and health/freshness state.
HEAD drift is detected as stale/unknown without treating stale as failure by itself.
Read operations never re-dump or mutate Git; refresh remains an explicit create/job operation.
The design can be consumed by Grabowski/Bureau receipts without making RepoBrief a control plane.

metadata.source_gap: Max-dump critique: bundles are often stale and require live fallback.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #916: added an explicit RepoBrief latest-complete registry and read-only freshness status path that records bundle manifest identity, source commit, health signals and fresh/stale/unknown state without hidden refresh during reads.
validation: Lenskit PR #916 GitHub CI passed: pytest-full, ruff, CodeQL, doc-freshness, planning-registration, anti-hallucination-lint, forensic preflight canary, parity-gate, repo-root, templates, validate-merge-meta, webui-js-tests, reusable fixture validation and contract/static-security checks.
Local before merge: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Local before merge: latest-complete registry schema parsed with json.tool.
Local before merge: planning-registration ratchet reported no new drift.
Local before merge: doc-freshness inspect PASS.
Local before merge: git diff --check origin/main...HEAD passed.
Post-merge on origin/main 1adb798cbc28541c97553823a1a6a2d563599611: same 185 tests passed.
Post-merge on origin/main: targeted ruff-ci check passed, schema parsed, planning-registration no new drift, doc-freshness PASS and git diff --check pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t003-registry: repobrief.latest_complete_registry records bundle stem, manifest path/hash, run id, generated_at, source commit, health signals and freshness vocabulary/state.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t003-head-drift: latest-complete status compares recorded source commit to an explicitly supplied local repo HEAD; matching HEAD is fresh, differing HEAD is stale, absent/unavailable information is unknown. Stale remains status=ok, not failure by itself.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t003-no-hidden-refresh: read-only status writes nothing, does not create snapshots, does not refresh bundles and does not mutate Git or source working trees. Registry writes occur only through explicit latest-complete write or explicit snapshot create --latest-complete-registry.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t003-operator-fit: surface is a bounded observation/receipt input for agents and Bureau/Grabowski; proof and output non-claims state it is not a control plane and does not establish truth, completeness, merge readiness or remote freshness.
